summary: Executed full backend + frontend end-to-end testing of PawCare. Backend: 26/26 pytest tests passed (auth, pets CRUD, visits/vaccines/treatments, upcoming dashboard, guides, AI advice, AI chat + history, auth enforcement, user isolation, cascade delete). Frontend: verified login, dashboard, pet creation via dialog, all three record types (visits/vaccines/treatments), AI advice generation (Italian response ~2600 chars from Claude), upcoming scadenze on dashboard (2 items sorted by days_left), guides page with Tutte/Cani/Gatti filters, AI chat assistant (received detailed Italian reply), and pet deletion with cascade. Everything working.

ui_bugs.issue: Veterinarian is displayed as 'Dr. Dr. Test' - frontend hardcodes 'Dr.' prefix so if the user types 'Dr. Bianchi' it duplicates. Either strip existing 'Dr.' or drop the hardcoded prefix.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Accessibility only, not a blocker. Consider adding <DialogDescription> to shadcn Dialog components (PetDialog, RecordDialog).

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Fix 'Dr. Dr.' duplication in PetDetail.jsx line ~161: either remove hardcoded 'Dr. ' prefix or strip user-provided prefix before display.
(Optional / accessibility) Add DialogDescription to shadcn DialogContent components to remove aria-describedby console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup')/('shutdown'); consider lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
CORS uses FRONTEND_URL env; allow_credentials=True with explicit origin - good. But CORS_ORIGINS env is defined in backend/.env but never used - dead config.
ai_chat writes user message BEFORE calling LlmChat; if LLM fails, user message will be persisted but no assistant reply - could confuse history rendering (minor).
google_session uses synchronous 'requests' inside async handler - blocks event loop briefly. Consider httpx.AsyncClient.
No pagination on list endpoints (pets, visits, chat history). Fine for MVP but should be noted.
test_credentials: admin@pawcare.it / admin123 - present in /app/memory/test_credentials.md, works. Registration also open (pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD - tests use @example.com).
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral TEST_ pets and records via API; all cleaned up via cascade delete in TestZCleanup. Chat history for the seeded admin now includes one extra message pair from the frontend chat test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (26 tests, ~35s including AI calls). pytest.ini uses xdist -n 2 --dist loadscope; class-level fixtures work per worker. Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.example TLDs - use @example.com. Google OAuth flow not directly testable (external redirect); button presence verified. All frontend flows working.
